name: Eminence Enterprise Limited
summary: Eminence Enterprise Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property investment and development activities in Hong Kong, the People's Republic of China, and Singapore. It operates through Property Investment, Property Development, Investment in Securities, and Loan Financing segments. The company owns and invests in residential, commercial, and industrial properties. It is also involved in investing in listed securities; and loan financing businesses. The company was formerly known as Easyknit Enterprises Holdings Limited and changed its name to Eminence Enterprise Limited in March 2016. Eminence Enterprise Limited was founded in 1981 and is based in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong. As on April 21, 2021, Eminence Enterprise Limited operates as a subsidiary of Ace Winner Investment Limited.
